name: Electrical Rough-In Pipeline
description: Four-step electrical pipeline strung from existing commands: build the electrical-fixture seed (now carrying a conduit terminal connector) -> place fixtures from room rules -> auto-drop conduit from every fixture connector to the nearest containment -> run the full validator suite. Select the target rooms before launching; PlaceFixturesCommand leaves the placed fixtures selected so AutoDropCommand (AutoConduitDrop) routes them in the next step with no manual re-selection. NOTE: step field names are commandTag/label to match the WorkflowStep POCO ([JsonProperty]); 'command'/'name' do NOT bind and produce a dead workflow.

steps.label: Build electrical fixture seed family
steps._notes: Generates STING_SEED_ElectricalFixture.rfa (protectExisting=true, so re-runs are safe). The seed authors one Domain=Conduit terminal connector (facing +Z, 20 mm) on every variant, giving AutoConduitDrop.FindBestFreeConnector() a real terminal instead of a LocationPoint fallback.

steps.label: Place fixtures from room rules
steps._notes: FixturePlacementEngine reads STING_PLACEMENT_RULES.electrical / .mk-electrical / .conduiting-phase + room types. Sockets / switches / FCUs / isolators / data outlets land per BS 7671 / BS 8300. On live placement PlaceFixturesCommand calls Selection.SetElementIds(placedIds) so the next step sees them selected.

steps.label: Auto-drop conduit to containment
steps._notes: AutoDropCommand groups the selection by discipline; Electrical fixtures dispatch to AutoConduitDrop, which starts at each fixture's conduit connector and routes a rising conduit to the nearest cable tray / conduit within the search radius, wiring both ends via Connector.ConnectTo. Also runs the Slab/Wall/Beam penetration detectors + FrpPenetrationPlacer sweep.

steps.label: Run full validator suite
steps._notes: ConnectivityValidator flags any conduit connector left open (CONN.OPEN) so unrouted fixtures surface immediately; PenetrationCoverageValidator flags any run that crossed a fire-rated barrier without a placed firestop.
